sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30691" key="e(/dnios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἕδν-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n30691.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bridal</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χιτών</foreign> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
